mean_en: a formal legal meeting in which evidence about crimes, disagreements, etc., is presented to a judge and often a jury so that decisions can be made according to the law
sentence: The case will be decided in court in front of a judge and jury.
sentence_trans: 这起案件将会在法官和陪审团面前当庭裁决。
word_etyma: com一起 + hort庭院 → 一起聚集在庭院中 → court法院；法庭
